descriptionText: Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 | Guest Cabin 4| Crew Cabin 4 PRICE:4,900,000 USIf you are looking for a comfortable and thoughtfully designed yacht in the 24‑metre range, this Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 is a strong option to consider. Delivered in 2019 and kept in good condition, she represents the practical and modern spirit of Sanlorenzo’s SX line, offering a pleasant balance between indoor and outdoor living. As the second model in the SX series, the SX76 reflects the brand’s intention to create a yacht that is easy to enjoy, socially oriented, and built for relaxed cruising with family and friends.Yacht Main Specifications: • Length: 23.8 m • Max Beam: 6.6 m • Draft: 1.6 m • Engines: 2 x Volvo Penta IPS3 1050 • Max Speed: 22 knots • Fuel Tank: 4,350 l • Water Tank: 1,400 l • Guest Cabins: 4 • Crew Cabins: 1 • Builder: SanlorenzoThe Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 design places a strong emphasis on open spaces, visibility, and a connection with the sea. Large windows throughout the main deck bring in plenty of natural light, creating an inviting atmosphere without feeling crowded. Studio Zuccon International handled the exterior design, while Piero Lissoni shaped the interiors with his well‑known clean and understated style. The result is a yacht that feels warm and liveable, with a layout that works well for extended stays on board.One of the defining features of the Sanlorenzo SX76 Sale 2019 is the decision to position the wheelhouse on the flybridge. This approach frees up valuable space on the main deck, allowing for either a dedicated forward dining area or a seamless open‑plan layout stretching from the aft deck through to the bow. The saloon functions as a central gathering point, featuring a comfortable seating area, dining space, entertainment system, and an open kitchen nearby. The furniture arrangement is flexible, giving owners the opportunity to personalise the setup to suit their preferences.Below deck, the accommodation is arranged to make best use of the yacht’s volume. The master suite sits mid‑ship, offering the most stable area of the boat, while the VIP cabin is positioned in the bow. A twin guest cabin and a crew cabin complete the lower‑deck arrangement. A standout interior element is the custom staircase designed by Lissoni, connecting all three decks in a smooth, flowing structure that enhances the overall feel of the yacht.Outdoor areas are equally well considered. The flybridge can be enclosed using Strataglass panels, allowing the space to adapt to different weather conditions. The aft area includes the popular 18‑square‑metre beach club, making it a great spot for water access or simply spending time close to the sea. Multiple seating zones across the decks offer a variety of places to relax, dine, or enjoy the view.This Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 also incorporates several eco‑friendly touches, from LED lighting and sustainable materials to efficient propulsion. Powered by twin Volvo Penta IPS3 1050 engines, she reaches up to 22 knots and cruises comfortably around 20 knots.This Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 presents a well‑rounded package for anyone seeking a modern, versatile yacht that has been maintained in good condition and offers a comfortable cruising experience.
descriptionHtml:
Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 | Guest Cabin 4| Crew Cabin 4
PRICE:4,900,000 US

If you are looking for a comfortable and thoughtfully designed yacht in the 24‑metre range, this Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 is a strong option to consider. Delivered in 2019 and kept in good condition, she represents the practical and modern spirit of Sanlorenzo’s SX line, offering a pleasant balance between indoor and outdoor living. As the second model in the SX series, the SX76 reflects the brand’s intention to create a yacht that is easy to enjoy, socially oriented, and built for relaxed cruising with family and friends.

Yacht Main Specifications:
• Length: 23.8 m
• Max Beam: 6.6 m
• Draft: 1.6 m
• Engines: 2 x Volvo Penta IPS3 1050
• Max Speed: 22 knots
• Fuel Tank: 4,350 l
• Water Tank: 1,400 l
• Guest Cabins: 4
• Crew Cabins: 1
• Builder: Sanlorenzo

The Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 design places a strong emphasis on open spaces, visibility, and a connection with the sea. Large windows throughout the main deck bring in plenty of natural light, creating an inviting atmosphere without feeling crowded. Studio Zuccon International handled the exterior design, while Piero Lissoni shaped the interiors with his well‑known clean and understated style. The result is a yacht that feels warm and liveable, with a layout that works well for extended stays on board.

One of the defining features of the Sanlorenzo SX76 Sale 2019 is the decision to position the wheelhouse on the flybridge. This approach frees up valuable space on the main deck, allowing for either a dedicated forward dining area or a seamless open‑plan layout stretching from the aft deck through to the bow. The saloon functions as a central gathering point, featuring a comfortable seating area, dining space, entertainment system, and an open kitchen nearby. The furniture arrangement is flexible, giving owners the opportunity to personalise the setup to suit their preferences.

Below deck, the accommodation is arranged to make best use of the yacht’s volume. The master suite sits mid‑ship, offering the most stable area of the boat, while the VIP cabin is positioned in the bow. A twin guest cabin and a crew cabin complete the lower‑deck arrangement. A standout interior element is the custom staircase designed by Lissoni, connecting all three decks in a smooth, flowing structure that enhances the overall feel of the yacht.

Outdoor areas are equally well considered. The flybridge can be enclosed using Strataglass panels, allowing the space to adapt to different weather conditions. The aft area includes the popular 18‑square‑metre beach club, making it a great spot for water access or simply spending time close to the sea. Multiple seating zones across the decks offer a variety of places to relax, dine, or enjoy the view.

This Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 also incorporates several eco‑friendly touches, from LED lighting and sustainable materials to efficient propulsion. Powered by twin Volvo Penta IPS3 1050 engines, she reaches up to 22 knots and cruises comfortably around 20 knots.

This Sanlorenzo SX76 For Sale 2019 presents a well‑rounded package for anyone seeking a modern, versatile yacht that has been maintained in good condition and offers a comfortable cruising experience.
